title: The One Where Chandler Can't Cry

lines.text: Monica and Chandler's, Rachel is still looking out the window as Joey enters.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: (sees Rachel) Oh, uh, hey Rach. I uh, I was just coming over here to uh... Oh wait, I don't have to lie to you, you don't live here anymore. Uh, I'm eating their food. What are you doing?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Ross is on a date with my sister and they shut the drapes two and a-half-hours ago.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Whoa, I didn't know we could date your sister!
Chandler and Monica enter from their room and Joey quickly hides the bag of potato chips behind his back.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Joey we know you steal our food.
Joey offers them some potato chips.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: I'm good.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: (To Rachel) Oh, are the drapes still closed hon?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Yeah. And y'know who should've shut their drapes? Is that perverted old couple two doors over.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: (looking) Is that a swing?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Oh don't even ask!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Yuck!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: I can't believe Ross went out with Rachel's sister! When Chandler made out with my sister I was mad at him for 10 years.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: That was like 5 years ago.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Yeah you got 5 years left!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Joey...

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: You wanna make it 6?!
Opening Credits
Central Perk, Ross is on the couch reading as Rachel enters. It's the next day.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Oh Ross, hi! Hey, how are ya? There you are!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Hey!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: (to Gunther) I'll take a coffee. (To Ross) So how was your big date last night?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Uhh, it was okay. Yeah, it was fun.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Yeah fun? Great! So uh, so did you guys hit it off?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: I guess so.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: So uh, so did anything happen? Because rumor has it you guys shut the drapes!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: No. No. Nothing happened. I shut the drapes to uh, show her slides of my favorite fossils.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Oh, slides. (Laughs.) So really nothing happened.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Something could've happened. All right? She-she really dug my slides. And-and she was definitely giving me the vibe.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Right. Was it the, "Please don't show me another picture of a trilobite vibe?"

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Anyway, if she, if she wasn't in to me, why-why would she ask me out again?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: She asked-asked you out again?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Yeah-uh-huh. Tomorrow night, Valentine's Day, the most romantic day of the year. Who knows what could happen? I might not be shutting my drapes to show her my slides, if you know what I mean.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Okay-okay-okay-okay-okay-okay-okay! I got it! I got it! I got it! I can't! I can't! I can't! I cannot go with you and my sister thing. Okay? I just can't. It's just too weird, all right? I imagine the two of you together and I freak out. It freaks me out. I can't do it! I can't do it.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: (while Rachel is finishing her rant) Okay! Okay! Okay! It's okay. (Rachel stops.) It's okay. Hey, it's too weird for you, I won't see her again.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Thank you. I...yeah.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: I mean after tomorrow night.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: No-no-no! No-no-no! Please Ross, I can't! I can't do it! (Starts to freak out.) It's just gonna freak me out!!!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Okay! Okay! Ooh-hey-hey-hey! Okay! Okay! Okay! I'll-I'll tell her tonight I can't see her anymore.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Ross thanks.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: You want me to call her right now?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Oh no! No! No-no-no-no! No, I mean come on that's-that's crazy-I mean that's crazy. So what's-what's going on with you? What is going on with you?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Well umm, oh! I might be teaching another class this semester!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Yeah do it now, call right now.
Monica and Chandler's, Chandler, Monica, Phoebe, and Joey are watching ET.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: (crying) This is my favorite part.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: (crying) Yeah me too.
We see the TV and it's the last scene where ET is saying goodbye.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Oh y'know what's sadder than this? Bambi. I cried for three days with that movie. No wait two! Because on the third day my mother killed herself so I was partly crying for that.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: (totally not crying) Well see now that I can see crying over, but Bambi is a cartoon!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: (crying) You didn't cry when Bambi's mother died?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Yes it was very sad when the guy stopped drawing the deer!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Chandler there's nothing wrong with crying! I mean you don't have to be so macho all the time.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: I'm not macho.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Yeah you're right. I don't know what I was thinking.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: No, I guess I just never really cried. Y'know? I'm not a crying kind of guy.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Come on man there's gotta be something that gets you choked up! Like uh, uh oh, what if you saw a three-legged puppy?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: I'd be sad sure, but I wouldn't cry.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Okay, what if the puppy said, "Help me Chandler. All the other puppies pick on me."

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Cry?! I just found a talking puppy, I'm rich!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Oh, I've got it! I have got it! (Gets up and gets something from the dresser underneath the TV.) Pictures from your childhood. This will get you going good!
Chandler starts paging through the album.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: All right, what's going on there? (Points to a picture.)

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Oh, that's Parent's Day, first grade. That's me with the janitor Martin.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Where were your parents?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Oh they didn't want to come!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Oh Chandler!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Poor thing!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: So that story doesn't make you cry?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: No! Look, I don't cry! It's not a big deal! Okay?!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: No! It's not okay! It's not okay at all!! You're dead inside!!
Central Perk, Phoebe is putting away her guitar as a man approaches.

lines.speaker: The Fan
lines.text: Excuse me.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Yeah?

lines.speaker: The Fan
lines.text: Are you Phoebe Buffay?

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Yeah.

lines.speaker: The Fan
lines.text: Can-can I get your autograph, I'm your biggest fan. (Holds out a napkin and a pen.)

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Oh you're my biggest fan? I've always wanted to meet you! Hi! (Shakes his hand.) Sure! Yeah! (Signs the autograph)

lines.speaker: The Fan
lines.text: Wow! Wow, thanks a lot! I just wanna say, I think you're really talented.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: You're just saying that because you're my biggest fan. (The fan leaves and Joey approaches.) (To Joey) Joey listen, take good care of that guy, okay? (Points) He's a fan. (To the fan as she's leaving) Bye! (Exits)

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: (to the fan) So, you saw me on Days Of Our Lives huh? Want me to, want me to do a little Dr. Drake Remoray for ya?

lines.speaker: The Fan
lines.text: I have no idea what you're talking about. But I, but I just got Phoebe Buffay's autograph!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Oh, you're Phoebe's fan!

lines.speaker: The Fan
lines.text: Oh yeah! I've seen all her movies.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Movies?

lines.speaker: The Fan
lines.text: That was Phoebe Buffay, the porn star.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: (laughs) I don't think so.

lines.speaker: The Fan
lines.text: No-no, it was! She was in Sex Toy Story 2, Lawrence of Alabia, and I got her autograph! The guys at the comic book store aren't gonna believe this! (Exits.)

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Hey Gunther, don't let that guy in here anymore! He just said Phoebe's a porn star!

lines.speaker: Gunther
lines.text: Well, I wouldn't call her a star, but she's really good. You should check out Inspecther Gadget.
Central Perk, time lapse, Rachel is at the counter as Jill enters.

lines.speaker: Jill
lines.text: Hey!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Hey!

lines.speaker: Jill
lines.text: You'll never believe what just happened, Ross just totally blew me off and he didn't even tell me why!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Ohhh well. Y'know what honey? The best thing to do to get over a guy is to start dating someone else. Oh! There is this great guy you will love at work named Bob! He's a real up-and-comer in Human Resources.

lines.speaker: Jill
lines.text: Y'know, thanks for trying to cheer me up, but I'm not gonna date some random guy from your work.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: It's not random, it's Bob.

lines.speaker: Jill
lines.text: It's probably because not mature enough. Or smart enough. Maybe he doesn't like the way I dress-No that can't be it. It's really gotta be the smart thing. Oh I'm so stupid! I'm just like this incredibly pretty stupid girl!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: No honey, okay, okay, you wanna know why Ross canceled the date? Because I asked him to.

lines.speaker: Jill
lines.text: You asked him too?!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Hm-mmm.

lines.speaker: Jill
lines.text: Why?!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Because you are my sister and Ross and I have this huge history...

lines.speaker: Jill
lines.text: I don't understand, do you want to go out with Ross?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: No.

lines.speaker: Jill
lines.text: You don't want him, but you don't want me to have him?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: (changing the subject) Y'know Bob in Human Resources...

lines.speaker: Jill
lines.text: Ugh! I cannot believe you did this too me! You had me doubting how smart I was! (Gasps) You had me doubting my fashion sense!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Look, this is not that big of a deal! You just don't date Ross! There's a million other guys out there, you just...

lines.speaker: Jill
lines.text: Hey! You have no right to tell me what to do.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: I'm not telling you what to do! I am telling you what not to do!

lines.speaker: Jill
lines.text: Why are you so jealous of me?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Jill this is not about me being jealous of you! This is about you being a brat! Wanting what you can't have!

lines.speaker: Jill
lines.text: Can't have?! Excuse me, the only thing I can't have is dairy! (Starts to storm out.)

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: All right, all right, well you just blew your chances at dating Bob!

lines.speaker: Jill
lines.text: Who?!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: In Human Resources!!!!!!
Monica and Chandler's, Rachel is ranting about Jill to Chandler and Monica.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: ...I am jealous of her?! I mean who does she think she is?! Princess Caroline?!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: You're jealous of Princess Caroline?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Do I have my own castle?
Joey and Ross enter.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Hey! Uh, Phoebe's not here is she?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: No.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: (noticing the bag Joey's carrying) Oh great! Did you get a movie?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Uhhh, yeah. Yeah. But uh, I don't think it's the kind you're gonna like.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: You didn't get more movies that are gonna have us reaching for the tissues all night did you?
Joey and Ross exchange looks.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Sort of...

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Guys, what's going on?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: (holds up the movie) Phoebe's a porn star!

lines.speaker: All
lines.text: What?!!
They all run over to Joey and Ross, Chandler grabs the movie and reads the title.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Phoebe Buffay in Buffay: The Vampire Layer.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Oh my God!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: That's Phoebe! Where did you get that?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Well down at the adult video place down on Bleaker.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: And-and I, and I saw that Joey was about to go in, so I ran in ahead of him to-to surprise him and, and then I pretended I didn't know he was in there. (They all kinda look at him.)

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Wow! I mean, I just-I can't, I can't believe this. Y'know, I mean you think you know someone even, even Phoebe who's always been somewhat of a question mark.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: This is so bizarre. I guess it kinda makes sense though, y'know she had such a terrible childhood.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Hey, I had a terrible childhood and I don't do porn.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Yes, but you are dead inside.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: All right well, I'd better take that back.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Wh-what, why?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: We can't watch that! I mean that's Phoebe!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Yeah you're right, we can't-we shouldn't watch this.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Absolutely not.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: (hands the tape back to Joey, but doesn't let him grab it) Y'know maybe a little bit!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Probably just the first half.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: No! Hey no! This is wrong you guys! Phoebe's our friend! Well, I'm not gonna watch it!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Yeah! Good for you Joe!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Yeah.
Ross stands next to him for a second, then goes and watches the movie.
The movie starts, it's a vampire's lair and Buffay, The Vampire Layer enters dressed in leather and carrying a wooden stake. Suddenly, the vampire opens his coffin and sits up.

lines.speaker: Buffay, the Vampire Layer
lines.text: Ah, I thought I'd find you here, Nasforatool.

lines.speaker: The Vampire
lines.text: Buffay, are you going to plunge your stake into my dark places?

lines.speaker: Buffay, the Vampire Layer
lines.text: Actually, I was kinda hoping it would be the other way around.
At this point, Buffay, the Vampire Layer and Nasforatool start to get it on. Of course, since this is network TV, we can only see the reactions of the gang to the film playing off screen.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Hold on a second! What is that on her ankle?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Her ankle is what you're watching?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Well it's hard to tell... (Rachel gets up to get a closer look, only she's having some trouble.) Oh God, if she would just stop moving.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: She's just doing her job!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: (sitting at the kitchen table with his back to the TV) You sick bastards!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Oh, it's a tattoo! That's weird, Phoebe doesn't... Wait that's Ursula! That's not Phoebe that is Ursula!
Upon hearing this, Joey can't turn his chair around fast enough and knocks it over.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Re! Re! Then I can watch that! Rewind it! Rewind it!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: (entering) Hey! What's up? (Sees the TV) Oh my God! What am I doing?!!
Commercial Break
Monica and Chandler's, Chandler is reading Chicken Soup for the Soul as Monica enters.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Hey sweetie!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Hey! (He quickly tries to hide the book by throwing it under the couch, only the couch has no back and it slides into the kitchen.)

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: (picking up the book) Chicken Soup for the Soul?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: There's no back to this couch!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Why are you reading this? You hate this kind of stuff.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Yeah I know, but I figured a shot y'know? Maybe one of those stories would make me cry and then you wouldn't think I was y'know, all dead inside.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Oh that's so sweet! Look Chandler I don't care if you can't cry, I love you.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Oh that makes me feel so warm in my hollow tin chest.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Stop it!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: No, I mean, come on, seriously think about it, we get married, we're up at the altar and I'm like this. (Makes a bored face.)

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: I won't care, because I know you will be feeling it all in here. (Points to her heart.)

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Yeah?

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Yeah! And if, and if we have a baby one-day, and the doctor hands it to you in the delivery room and you don't cry, so what! And-and-and, and if we take him to college and come home and see his empty room for the first time, and you got nothing, it won't matter to me.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Okay, well I won't uh, worry about this anymore then.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: And-and-and if I die, from a long illness. And you're writing out my eulogy and you open a desk drawer and you find a note from me that says, "I will always be with you," and you still can't shed one tiny tear, I know you'll be crying a river inside.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Aww, I love you so...

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: What is wrong with you?!!!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: What?!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: What?! You can't shed a tear for your dead wife!! Now, I left you a note from the beyond!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: So you didn't mean any of that?!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: No you robot!!
Ross's apartment, his doorbell is ringing and he's running to answer it while doing up his pants.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: You damn kids! You ring my bell one more time, I swear to... (Opens the door to find Jill standing there.) Ohh, uh Jill. Umm, that-that's just a little game I play with the kids down the hall. Umm, they've really taken a liking to me. (Quickly looks out to see if they're watching.) Uhh what's-what's-what's the matter?

lines.speaker: Jill
lines.text: Rachel and I had a really big fight, can I come in? I-I mean I know we're not supposed to see each other anymore and I'm okay with that, it's just that I don't know anybody in the city and I really need somebody to talk to about it.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Of course, what happened? (Lets her in.)

lines.speaker: Jill
lines.text: (entering) I don't want to talk about it.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Okay, umm...

lines.speaker: Jill
lines.text: But you know what might really cheer me up?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: What?

lines.speaker: Jill
lines.text: Seeing some more of your super-cool slides.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Wow! Really?!

lines.speaker: Jill
lines.text: Totally, I love them! And, maybe you could finish telling me about all the different kinds of sand.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Well, I'd love to! Here, you wait right here and I'll go get the projector and my notes!

lines.speaker: Jill
lines.text: Oh great! Thanks Ross, you're such a good friend!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Ohh!
He goes into another room to get his projector and notes. While he's gone, Jill quickly checks her makeup.
[Cut to Monica and Chandler's, Rachel is entering.]

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Hey! Have you guys seen Jill? I can't find her anywhere.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: No, I haven't.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Well, is Ross home? Maybe I'll just call him to see if he's actually seen her.
She goes to look out the window at Ross's apartment and sees Jill staring at her and closing the drapes with an evil look on her face. Rachel is stunned into silence.
Ursula's apartment, Phoebe is going to confront her twin about her new porn career.

lines.speaker: Ursula
lines.text: Who is it?

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: It's Phoebe! Phoebe!
Ursula opens the door and is all dressed up with big hair and lingerie.

lines.speaker: Ursula
lines.text: Hey!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: (seeing her dress) Oh God. So-so you're making porn movies.

lines.speaker: Ursula
lines.text: No I'm not.
Someone calls out from her apartment.

lines.speaker: Man's Voice
lines.text: We're still rolling!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: You're making one right now!

lines.speaker: Another Man's Voice
lines.text: Let's go Phoebe!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: And-and you're using my name!

lines.speaker: Ursula
lines.text: Yeah, can I help you with something?

lines.speaker: Same Man's Voice
lines.text: Phoebe, come on!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Look, I'm talking right now! You're-you mean her.

lines.speaker: Ursula
lines.text: Y'know, twin stuff is always a real big seller.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: What?!

lines.speaker: Ursula
lines.text: Yeah, I can talk them into giving you like, 30 dollars.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: No!! No way! No! And stop using my name! And shame on you! (Yells into the apartment) And shame on all of you! You're disgusting! Especially you (points to someone) with that! (Storms away.)
Ross's apartment, Ross is setting up for the slide show.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Slides are almost ready.

lines.speaker: Jill
lines.text: Yeah. Ooh, I know what this is missing! Alcohol!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Uh okay, well there's-there's wine in the kitchen.

lines.speaker: Jill
lines.text: Oh great! (Goes to get it as the phone rings.)

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: (answering it) Hello?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: (on phone) What is my sister doing there?! And why are the drapes shut?!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: O-okay, Rach calm-calm down, okay? She-she's really upset we're just talking.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Ross! I think she is trying to make something happen with you to get back at me!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: So that's the only reason she could be here huh? It couldn't have anything to do with the fact that-that maybe I'm a good listener and I uh I put on a great slide show!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Ross, I am telling you that she is using you to get back at me!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Y'know what? I think I can take care of myself, I'll talk to you later. Good-bye. (Hangs up the phone and turns to find Jill sitting really close to him.) Whoa! Uh, that was your sister actually. She-she thinks that you're just using me.

lines.speaker: Jill
lines.text: So? (Kisses him passionately.)
Central Perk, Joey is reading a paper as Phoebe enters.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Hey!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Hey!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: So, I just came from the company Ursula works for.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Oh no, not you too!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: No! No! I just went to pick up Phoebe Buffay's checks; there were a lot of them.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Nice!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Um-mmm, and I won't have to go there anymore because I gave them my correct address.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: That's great, but isn't it gonna bother that people still think you're a porn star?

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Oh no! No! I know how to handle it.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: You do?

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Yeah. (She notices some guy putting a coat on his girlfriend is trying to remember where he's seen her before.) (To him) You're trying to figure out where you know me from? All right, I'll give you a hint. From porn! Okay? (He tries to rush his girlfriend out.) Yeah your pervert boyfriend watched me in a porno movie! (To Joey) See?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Yeah.
Monica and Chandler's, time lapse, Ross is entering. Chandler and Monica are at the kitchen table. Rachel is on the couch reading.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Hey.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: (To Rachel) You uh, you may have been right about Jill.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Oh! I knew it! What happened?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Umm, she kissed me.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: What?! You kissed!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: (To Monica) Maybe we should give them some privacy.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: (To Chandler) Shhhh!!!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Look, I uh, I tried not to kiss her, okay?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Well, it doesn't sound like it! I mean, it's pretty easy not to kiss someone, you just don't kiss them! See look at us, right now, not kissing!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Let me finish, okay? She started kissing me and-and I didn't stop it. I guess I-I just wasn't thinking...

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Yeah that's right you weren't thinking! Y'know what? Let me give you something to think about! (She pulls up her sleeves and steps towards him.)

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Oh wait-hold it! But then I started thinking and I stopped the kissing.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Oh, well thank you for taking your tongue out of my sister's mouth long enough to tell me that.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Look I-I realize if anything were to happen with me and Jill then nothing could ever happen with us!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: What?!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: No, I mean, look I don't know if anything is going to happen with us, again. Ever. But I don't want to know that it-it never could. So I stopped it and she got mad and broke my projector.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Wow. I, I don't even know what to say. Thank you. (Gently kicks him.)

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: You're welcome. (Gently kicks her back.)
Chandler starts crying.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Oh my God! Are-are you crying?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: (crying hysterically) I just don't see why those two can't work things out!
Ending Credits
Central Perk, everyone is there as Jill enters.

lines.speaker: Jill
lines.text: All right, I'm leaving! Because I'm not going to spend one more day with someone whose out to sabotage my every move. That's you Rachel!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Yeah, I got that.

lines.speaker: Jill
lines.text: (To Ross) And you! I throw myself at you and you say no, how gay are you?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: You take care Jill.

lines.speaker: Jill
lines.text: (happily) Okay, see ya! (Exits.)

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Bye-bye-e!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Bye.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: (starts crying) I-I can't believe Jill's gone. (They all look at him.) I can't help it, I opened a gate.
End
